---
# ── LECTURE NOTES TEMPLATE ────────────────────────────────────────────────────
# Copy this file's front matter into your topic's lecture.qmd.
# Replace all values marked with ← EDIT.

title: "Topic Title — Lecture Notes"           # ← EDIT
author: "Your Name"                            # ← EDIT
date: last-modified
date-format: "DD MMMM YYYY"

# Must match a key in shared/styles/shared.typ topic-colours
topic-key: "algebra"                           # ← EDIT
topic-title: "Algebra"                         # ← EDIT
institution: "Gymnasium — Mathematics"         # ← EDIT (or set in _metadata.yml)

exercise-reset-per-chapter: true

format:
  typst:
    toc: true
    toc-depth: 3
    number-sections: true
    papersize: a4
    include-before-body:
      - path: ../../shared/styles/lecture.typ  # ← adjust depth if needed

filters:
  - ../../shared/filters/exercise-solutions.lua
---

<!-- 
  Call setup-lecture once at the top of the document body.
  topic-key and topic-title must match your _metadata.yml values.
-->

```{=typst}
#setup-lecture("algebra", "Algebra", "Gymnasium — Mathematics")
#let p = get-palette("algebra")
```

# Chapter Title

## Section Title

Content goes here.
